results.title: EDITORIAL: Stop meddling in elections process
results.description: The engines of Hawaii’s vote-by-mail system are starting to rev up as the state prepares to print the ballots for the Aug. 8 primary election. And this is happening in the midst of some turbulence nationally over how the midterm elections will play out through the fall. The post EDITORIAL: Stop meddling in elections process appeared first on The Garden Island .

results.title: Lawyer who beat Hawaii gun law calls state’s reliance on Black Code ‘disgraceful’
results.description: The attorney who helped persuade the Supreme Court to strike down Hawaii’s private-property concealed-carry restriction... The post Lawyer who beat Hawaii gun law calls state’s reliance on Black Code ‘disgraceful’ appeared first on Democratic Accent .

results.title: How ‘Khabar Lahariya’, a four-page monthly newspaper from Bundelkhand, survived into the digital age
results.description: Written by 10 women who are part of the feminist collective, this story of a small, women-led newspaper’s evolution into the digital era is a handbook of what journalism should be in a democracy
